_comment: JS mutation testing for the caveman oracle surface. Run via bunx (bun-only policy): `bunx stryker run`. JS is retiring (R6b) so the global gate is NON-BLOCKING (report-only). The surviving opencode plugin shim is the exception — CI runs Stryker scoped to src/plugins/opencode/** with a real threshold.
_ignore_note: This repo is colocated git+jj (Jujutsu). Stryker's sandbox copy chokes on the .jj socket files (ENOTSUP copyfile) — ignore .jj/.git and the build/cache dirs so the sandbox stays small and copyable.
_thresholds_note: break=null → Stryker never fails the build globally (JS retiring). CI overrides break for the opencode-shim-scoped run.
